name: Raging Blow
description: Deals multiple powerful sword strikes to nearby enemies in a wide arc.

name: Combo Attack
description: Builds combo orbs with each attack, increasing damage and enabling combo-consuming skills.

name: Enrage
description: Consumes all combo orbs to enter an enraged state with massively increased damage.

name: Valhalla
description: Summons the warriors of Valhalla to deal massive damage to all enemies on screen.

name: Blast
description: Unleashes holy energy in a powerful frontal blast charged by elemental stacks.

name: Divine Charge
description: Imbues weapon with holy energy, adding divine damage and stun chance to all attacks.

name: Sacrosanctity
description: Creates a zone of divine protection making the entire party invincible for a duration.

name: Gungnir's Descent
description: Summons the legendary spear Gungnir to rain devastating strikes from above.

name: Final Pact
description: Upon taking lethal damage, cheats death and gains temporary invincibility and boosted stats.

name: Dark Spear
description: Sacrifices HP to conjure a massive dark spear that pierces through all enemies in a line.

name: Meteor Shower
description: Calls down a devastating rain of meteors that engulf the entire screen in flames.

name: Paralyze
description: Fires a condensed bolt of fire and poison that paralyzes and damages enemies.

name: Mist Eruption
description: Detonates all poison mist on the field for massive area burst damage.

name: Chain Lightning
description: Fires a bolt of lightning that chains between up to 10 enemies.

name: Blizzard
description: Summons a massive blizzard that freezes and damages all enemies on screen.

name: Frozen Orb
description: Launches a slow-moving ice orb that continuously damages and freezes enemies it passes through.

name: Angel Ray
description: Fires a ray of holy light that heals allies and damages undead enemies simultaneously.

name: Resurrection
description: Revives all fallen party members in the vicinity with a portion of their HP restored.

name: Holy Symbol
description: Blesses the party with increased experience gain and drop rate for a duration.

name: Infinity
description: Enters a state of infinite mana with escalating damage boost over time.

name: Hurricane
description: Fires arrows at extreme speed in a continuous stream, the fastest attack in the game.

name: Arrow Blaster
description: Plants a turret that automatically fires arrows at nearby enemies.

name: Arrow Rain
description: Rains down a barrage of arrows over a wide area.

name: Snipe
description: Fires a perfectly aimed shot that deals massive single-target damage with guaranteed critical.

name: Piercing Arrow
description: Fires a bolt that pierces through all enemies in a line with increasing damage.

name: Split Shot
description: Fires a bolt that splits into multiple projectiles upon hitting the first target.

name: Quad Star
description: Throws four stars simultaneously at enemies with blinding speed.

name: Showdown
description: Marks enemies for death, increasing EXP and drop rate from marked targets while dealing damage.

name: Mark of Assassin
description: Throwing stars leave a mark on hit enemies, causing additional star explosions.

name: Assassinate
description: Delivers a devastating two-part slash from the shadows with massive critical damage.

name: Meso Explosion
description: Detonates meso coins dropped on the ground for area-of-effect explosion damage.

name: Dark Sight
description: Becomes invisible, avoiding enemy detection and attacks.

name: Phantom Blow
description: Slashes enemies with both blades in a rapid six-hit combo.

name: Blade Fury
description: Spins both blades in a devastating whirlwind hitting all surrounding enemies.

name: Final Cut
description: Dashes through enemies with a lethal cross-slash, boosting damage afterward.

name: Octopunch
description: Unleashes a barrage of eight rapid punches on enemies directly ahead.

name: Power Unity
description: Transforms into a supercharged energy state with dramatically enhanced stats and skills.

name: Serpent Screw
description: Uppercuts enemies into the air with a spiraling energy punch.

name: Rapid Fire
description: Fires bullets at extreme speed in a continuous barrage at a single target.

name: Ugly Bomb
description: Throws a massive bomb that explodes on impact dealing huge area damage.

name: Broadside
description: Summons a battleship that continuously bombards the area with cannon fire.

name: Cannon Barrage
description: Fires a massive cannonball that explodes on impact, hitting a wide area.

name: Monkey Militia
description: Summons a squad of armed monkeys that assist in attacking enemies.

name: ICBM
description: Launches an intercontinental ballistic monkey that carpet-bombs the entire screen.

name: Cardinal Deluge
description: Fires a torrent of ancient arrows in deluge mode, hitting multiple enemies.

name: Raven Tempest
description: Summons a storm of spectral ravens that assault enemies from all directions.

name: Ancient Astra
description: Channels the full power of the ancient bow to fire a devastating beam of energy.

name: Moon Dancer
description: Performs a rapid lunar-stance sword dance hitting enemies multiple times.

name: Sun Cross
description: Delivers a powerful cross-slash infused with solar energy in sun stance.

name: Equinox Cycle
description: Rapidly alternates between sun and moon stances for a devastating combined assault.

name: Orbital Flame
description: Controls a flame that orbits in the direction of the cursor, burning all enemies in its path.

name: Blazing Extinction
description: Creates a massive fire tornado at the cursor location that pulls in and incinerates enemies.

name: Song of Heaven
description: Fires wind-enchanted arrows at incredible speed, with trifling wind arrows joining the assault.

name: Trifling Wind
description: Summons autonomous wind arrows that periodically attack nearby enemies on their own.

name: Quintuple Star
description: Throws five shadow-infused stars simultaneously at enemies.

name: Shadow Bat
description: Summons shadow bats that automatically attack nearby enemies alongside your stars.

name: Thunderbolt
description: Strikes enemies with a powerful lightning-charged punch that chains to nearby foes.

name: Annihilate
description: Performs a devastating three-hit lightning combo as the ultimate link skill finisher.

name: Typhoon
description: Creates a massive electrical typhoon that pulls in and electrocutes all surrounding enemies.

name: Royal Guard
description: Blocks an incoming attack with precise timing, countering with a powerful shield strike.

name: Radiant Cross
description: Slashes enemies in a cross pattern with holy-charged sword strikes.

name: Beyond Blade
description: Executes a massive overswing with the polearm, hitting enemies in a wide frontal arc.

name: Adrenaline Rush
description: When combo count reaches maximum, enters a boosted state with increased attack speed and damage.

name: Maha's Domain
description: Summons the spirit of Maha to create a massive blizzard that freezes and damages all enemies.

name: Mana Burst
description: Channels raw magical energy through Mir for a concentrated burst attack.

name: Dragon Breath
description: Commands Mir to unleash a stream of dragon breath that scorches enemies continuously.

name: Dragon Master
description: Evan and Mir combine into a fusion state, dramatically enhancing all dragon skills.

name: Ishtar's Ring
description: Fires a continuous stream of magic arrows from both bowguns at extreme speed.

name: Spikes Royale
description: Performs an acrobatic aerial spin attack hitting all enemies in a wide radius.

name: Legendary Spear
description: Summons the legendary elven spear to impale all enemies in a line with nature's wrath.

name: Mille Aiguilles
description: Thrusts the cane thousands of times in rapid succession like a fencing barrage.

name: Impeccable Memory
description: Copies and stores a skill from any Explorer class to use as your own.

name: Luck of the Draw
description: Draws a random card that grants various powerful buffs depending on the suit.

name: Reflection
description: Fires a beam of light that bounces between enemies in light mode.

name: Apocalypse
description: Opens a dark portal that continuously damages enemies in dark mode.

name: Equilibrium
description: When light and dark gauges are balanced, enters Equilibrium state allowing use of both skill sets.

name: Spirit Claw
description: Summons fox spirit claws to rake enemies with rapid ghostly slashes.

name: Bomb Punch
description: Delivers an explosive punch backed by spirit energy, knocking enemies back.

name: Spirit Gate
description: Opens a spiritual gate that summons fox spirits to bind and damage enemies in the area.

name: Demon Lash
description: Slashes enemies with demonic fury, generating Demon Fury resource with each hit.

name: Demon Impact
description: Slams the ground with demonic energy, creating a massive shockwave.

name: Infernal Concussion
description: Detonates stored Demon Fury in a massive explosion around the caster.

name: Nether Shield
description: Conjures shields of dark energy that slash enemies while draining their life force.

name: Exceed: Execution
description: A powerful Exceed skill that grows stronger with each consecutive use at the cost of HP.

name: Dark Genesis
description: Rips open the fabric of space to deal massive dark magic damage to all enemies on screen.

name: Finishing Blow
description: Strikes enemies with a powerful staff blow enhanced by active aura effects.

name: Battle Aura
description: Activates one of multiple auras that provide different combat buffs to the party.

name: Wild Arrow Blast
description: Fires a rapid stream of crossbow bolts while riding the jaguar mount.

name: Jaguar Storm
description: Summons multiple jaguars to stampede across the battlefield trampling all enemies.

name: Heavy Salvo Plus
description: Fires a continuous stream of heavy mech-gun rounds at enemies.

name: Robot Mastery
description: Enhances all summoned robots with increased damage, duration, and attack speed.

name: Bots 'n Tots
description: Deploys multiple support robots that attack enemies and provide buffs in the area.

name: Magnum Punch
description: Delivers a devastating arm cannon punch with maximum charge for massive impact.

name: Double Blast
description: Fires both arm cannons simultaneously for a devastating double explosion.

name: Rocket Punch
description: Launches forward with rocket propulsion for a gap-closing explosive punch.

name: Beam Dance
description: Performs a rapid series of energy sword slashes while dashing through enemies.

name: Mecha Purge
description: Fires a massive energy cannon blast from Xenon's cybernetic systems.

name: Multilateral
description: Passively increases all three main stats equally, enhancing Xenon's hybrid scaling.

name: Gigas Wave
description: Swings the massive sword to create a wave of draconic energy.

name: Dragon Slash
description: A powerful vertical slash empowered by dragon transformation energy.

name: Final Form
description: Transforms into the ultimate dragon warrior form with massively enhanced power and new skills.

name: Soul Seeker
description: Fires homing soul energy projectiles that seek out and automatically target enemies.

name: Trinity
description: Fires three consecutive soul blasts that increase in power with each hit.

name: Finale Ribbon
description: Performs a flashy idol finisher attack, wrapping enemies in explosive energy ribbons.

name: Chain Arts: Fury
description: Unleashes a rapid chain of weapon switches and attacks in a freestyle combo.

name: Chain Arts: Maelstrom
description: Swings the chain in a massive whirlwind, pulling in and shredding all nearby enemies.

name: Chain Arts: Thrash
description: Lashes out with the chain for a quick mid-combo repositioning attack.

name: Javelin
description: Fires a crystal javelin that pierces through enemies in a line.

name: Crystal Gate
description: Places a crystal gate that fires autonomous energy beams at nearby enemies.

name: Reaction: Domination
description: Detonates all crystal constructs on the field for a massive chain explosion.

name: Cleave
description: Commands ethereal swords to sweep through enemies in a wide devastating arc.

name: Hunting Decree
description: Commands all floating swords to converge and assault a single target area.

name: Aether Forge
description: Creates additional ethereal swords from Aether energy to increase autonomous attack count.

name: Consuming Flames
description: Summons a devastating flame attack from the heaven gauge of Taoist magic.

name: Scroll of Warding: Ground
description: Uses earth-element Taoist scroll to create an earthquake damaging all grounded enemies.

name: Clone: Rampage
description: Creates multiple clones that attack all enemies on screen simultaneously.

name: Mountain Spirit Eruption
description: Channels the mountain spirit through the bell for a powerful eruption of natural energy.

name: River Spirit Song
description: Rings the bell to call upon river spirits that wash over and damage enemies.

name: Nature's Embrace
description: Summons the full power of nature spirits to heal allies and damage enemies in a wide area.

name: Death Blessing
description: Fires a malice-charged shot that marks enemies for additional damage from follow-up attacks.

name: Phantom Blade
description: Unleashes a spectral blade slash empowered by suppressed malice energy.

name: Dragon Burst
description: Channels Drakas dragon energy into a devastating ranged blast.

name: Moon Strike
description: Alpha performs a rapid series of slashes with the long sword.

name: Earth Break
description: Beta smashes the ground with the heavy sword creating a devastating shockwave.

name: Time Holding
description: Freezes time for all enemies on screen, leaving them vulnerable to attacks.

name: Joint Attack
description: Alpha and Beta attack simultaneously in a coordinated dual assault.

name: Psychic Grab
description: Telekinetically grabs objects and enemies, hurling them for massive damage.

name: Ultimate: Trainwreck
description: Telekinetically summons and crashes a full-size train onto enemies.

name: Psychic Tornado
description: Creates a psychic vortex that pulls in debris and enemies, grinding them for damage.

name: Shinsoku
description: Draws and strikes with the katana at blinding speed in a battoujutsu technique.

name: Rai Sanrenzan
description: Performs three consecutive lightning-fast sword slashes in a single motion.

name: Iaijutsu: Phantom Blade
description: A supreme iaijutsu technique that creates phantom blade afterimages hitting all enemies.

name: Vanquisher's Charm
description: Throws spirit-sealing charms that explode on contact with enemies.

name: Kishin Shoukan
description: Summons two spirit demons that increase monster spawn rate and attack enemies in the area.

name: Spirit Domain
description: Creates a spiritual barrier zone that boosts party damage and continuously harms enemies within.

name: Bear Assault
description: Fort the bear charges forward with a devastating tackle attack.

name: Leopard's Pounce
description: Lai the snow leopard pounces on enemies with rapid claw strikes.

name: Hawk Flock
description: Eka the hawk summons a flock of birds that dive-bomb enemies from above.

name: Ink Splash
description: Flings enchanted ink that splashes across enemies, dealing magical damage.

name: Calligraphy Strike
description: Draws a powerful calligraphic character in the air that materializes as a damaging force.

name: Living Painting
description: Brings a painted creature to life that fights alongside the caster.

name: Glaive Sweep
description: Sweeps the glaive in a wide arc, hitting all enemies in range with fluid grace.

name: Rising Dragon
description: Launches upward with the glaive in a spiraling dragon-inspired rising slash.

name: Falling Blossom
description: Descends from above with the glaive in an elegant falling strike like scattered petals.
